author: joshuakto
description: Minimalist File gIT (FIT) to sync your files across mobile and desktop devices using GitHub.

manifest.author: joshuakto
manifest.description: Minimalist File gIT (FIT) to sync your files across mobile and desktop devices using GitHub.
manifest.name: Fit

name: Fit

releases.author: dbarnett
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* fix(#146): failed large files cleanly message size errors instead of failing whole sync by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/277
* fix local SHA calculations to use canonical SHAs by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/278
* fix transient upload failures to defer remainder to next sync by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/279
* fix attempting 2nd sync during sync to not get stuck infinitely by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/280
* fix(#283): data loss risks from considering only local files ignoring _fit/ by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/284
* refactor: rename fitSetting.ts to fitSettingTab.ts by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/285
* test: refactor FitPlugin into its own file and add coverage by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/286
* dev: vcs hooks setup with lefthook by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/287
* fix: eliminate TOCTOU race in saveLocalStore/saveSettings by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/288
* include error stacks in logging by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/289
* perf: fix wasteful round-trips on FileContent by storing raw bytes & caching base64 by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/290
* feat: Explain sync status command by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/291
* feat(#92): Sync hidden files (on by default) by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/292
* docs: fix CLAUDE.md symlink, update CONTRIBUTING.md roadmap by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/293
* feat(#67): Obsidian config sync — selective .obsidian/ opt-in with field-change warnings by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/295
* ci: scripts for creating release + newline fix for version-bump.mjs by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/299
* ci: fix release script to run on publish, update lock by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/300
* ci: add workflow_dispatch to release-assets for manual re-trigger by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/301


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/compare/1.5.0...1.6.0-alpha.1
releases.name: 1.6.0-alpha.1

releases.author: dbarnett
releases.description:
## What's Changed

### New Features
* Encryption by @beachvisitor in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/212
* Respect local .gitignore files by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/268

### Bug Fixes & Improvements
* remove unsupported Buffer and process usages by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/259
* avoid showing "Check internet" for low-level errors by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/260
* tighten heuristic for "suspicious filename" logging by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/261
* handle a few potential sources of undefined content for 'replace' err by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/262
* TextDecoder needs fatal:true by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/266
* rich notice previews in settings by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/272
* fix settings manual sync icon + mention advanced by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/273
* Unified repo/owner combo boxes by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/189
* Better-behaved InputSuggest vs raw datalist for owner/repo by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/198
* Minor fixes after InputSuggest change by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/199
* docs: Add subsection in doc on how to trigger sync on Obsidian Mobile by @James-Leste in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/209
* docs: slight PAT clarification, update CONTRIBUTING.md roadmap after 1.4.0 by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/253

<details>
<summary>Dependency updates, tests, and maintenance</summary>

* test(#192): Add WDIO Obsidian E2E testing setup by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/194
* tests(#192): Enhance WDIO coverage with repo fetching and dropdown interaction by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/197
* tests(#192): E2E Android emulator tests by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/200
* build(deps-dev): bump tar from 7.5.2 to 7.5.3 in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/206
* Bump octokit (core@7.0.6), types for node & globals, and eslint/esbuild by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/207
* build(deps): bump fast-xml-parser from 5.3.3 to 5.4.1 in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/222
* build(deps-dev): bump flatted from 3.3.3 to 3.4.2 in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/233
* build(deps): bump fast-xml-parser from 5.4.1 to 5.5.7 in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/232
* build(deps): bump undici in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/230
* build(deps-dev): bump tar from 7.5.3 to 7.5.11 in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/228
* build(deps): bump minimatch in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/223
* build(deps): bump basic-ftp from 5.1.0 to 5.2.0 in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/220
* build(deps): bump @xmldom/xmldom from 0.8.11 to 0.8.12 in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/238
* build(deps-dev): bump happy-dom from 20.0.11 to 20.8.9 in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/236
* build(deps): bump follow-redirects from 1.15.11 to 1.16.0 in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/242
* build(deps): bump fast-xml-parser from 5.5.7 to 5.7.1 in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/245
* build(deps): bump picomatch in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/235
* build(deps): bump basic-ftp from 5.2.0 to 5.2.2 in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/240
* build(deps-dev): bump postcss from 8.5.6 to 8.5.13 in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/247
* build(deps): bump ip-address from 10.1.0 to 10.2.0 in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/248
* build(deps): bump fast-xml-builder from 1.1.5 to 1.2.0 in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/250
* build(deps): bump fast-uri from 3.1.0 to 3.1.2 in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/251
* tests: upgrade to appium 3 and wdio-obsidian-service 2.4 by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/255
* build(deps-dev): bump ajv from 6.12.6 to 6.15.0 in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/256
* build(deps-dev): bump vite from 7.2.2 to 7.3.3 in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/257
* build(deps-dev): bump rollup from 4.53.2 to 4.60.3 in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/221
* build(deps-dev): bump brace-expansion from 1.1.12 to 1.1.14 in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/258
* docs: fix outdated statuses about eslint/validation by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/264
* chore: update package-lock.json by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/267
* test: release guideline docs + pr-checks for version metadata by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/269
* docs: add basic AGENTS.md by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/271

</details>

## New Contributors
* @James-Leste made their first contribution in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/209
* @beachvisitor made their first contribution in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/212

## More info

See [Milestone 1.5](https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/milestone/2) for more context.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/compare/1.4.0...1.5.0

releases.name: 1.5.0-beta

releases.author: dbarnett
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* refactor: differentiate types for BlobSha/CommitSha/TreeSha by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/124
* fix: encode large string causing range error by @kj-9 in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/127
* perf: skip re-read after sync, better timing logging by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/128
* fix(#129): sync notices for conflicts, comparison notice for "untracked" state by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/130
* refactor: LocalChange, change type, and FileStates by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/131
* fix: concurrency concerns in applyChanges by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/132
* fix: skip full re-read from remote after sync by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/134
* fix: prevent sync option getting stuck disabled after uncaught error by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/135
* test: Migrate from Jest to Vitest by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/137
* fix(#81): handle errors in onload by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/139
* fix(#51): detect ambiguous encoding and (for now) log warnings by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/140
* feat: Better clearer logging, capturing more timing and visual emoji indicators by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/142
* build(deps-dev): bump js-yaml from 4.1.0 to 4.1.1 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/141
* build: Fix some TS config warnings by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/143
* perf: Optimize GitHub API calls for fetching commit/tree SHAs by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/144
* perf: parallelize local/remote vault reads, improve related logging by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/145
* fix: per-file error messaging by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/147
* feat: Better debug logging by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/149
* fix(#151): Use Obsidian arrayBufferToBase64 to fix `ReferenceError: Buffer is not defined` by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/152
* fix: better sync error notices and per-file error messaging by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/150
* docs: better user help in README.md and better CONTRIBUTING.md by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/154
* docs: Fix list of large file solutions in README.md by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/155
* Fix: binary file detection by @arudenkoofficial in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/161
* cleanup: Simplify error/isBinary cases, fix lint by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/163
* feat(#51): Add encoding corruption diagnostics by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/166
* docs(#51): explain knowns so far about encoding corruption and logging for it by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/167
* fix(#153): unhelpful "Folder already exists" error message for sync to local by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/168
* fix(#156): prevent binary file corruption via fatal UTF-8 validation by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/170
* dev: fix .editorconfig to not force tab sizes by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/171
* refactor(#169): consolidate untracked path safety checks by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/172
* refactor(#169): add clashPaths parameter to applyChanges() (no-op) by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/173
* refactor(#169): enable SHA keying by original path for clash files by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/175
* fix(#169): record baseline SHA when untracked files clash by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/174
* Fix LocalVault to handle unindexed files (hidden files) by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/178
* feat: improve UX for protected/unreadable conflicts by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/181
* feat: Add manual repo entry for contributor repos by @nickarrow in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/183
* feat: support empty subsequent subdirectories with eventual files and improve adapter compatibility by @nickarrow in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/184
* fix(auth): Allow re-authentication after token change by @nickarrow in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/185
* refactor(#180): Extract GitHubConnection class for stateless GitHub operations + FitSettingTab tests by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/187

## New Contributors
* @kj-9 made their first contribution in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/127
* @dependabot[bot] made their first contribution in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/141
* @arudenkoofficial made their first contribution in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/161
* @nickarrow made their first contribution in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/183

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/compare/1.3.0...1.4.0

releases.author: dbarnett
releases.description:
## Breaking changes
* Dropped support for Obsidian versions older than 1.9.10 (oldest version with non-EoL Electron on Desktop)

## What's Changed
* docs: Fix list of large file solutions in README.md by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/155
* Fix: binary file detection by @arudenkoofficial in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/161
* cleanup: Simplify error/isBinary cases, fix lint by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/163
* feat(#51): Add encoding corruption diagnostics by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/166
* docs(#51): explain knowns so far about encoding corruption and logging for it by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/167
* fix(#153): unhelpful "Folder already exists" error message for sync to local by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/168
* fix(#156): prevent binary file corruption via fatal UTF-8 validation by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/170
* dev: fix .editorconfig to not force tab sizes by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/171
* refactor(#169): consolidate untracked path safety checks by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/172
* refactor(#169): add clashPaths parameter to applyChanges() (no-op) by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/173
* refactor(#169): enable SHA keying by original path for clash files by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/175
* fix(#169): record baseline SHA when untracked files clash by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/174
* Fix LocalVault to handle unindexed files (hidden files) by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/178
* feat: improve UX for protected/unreadable conflicts by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/181

## New Contributors
* @arudenkoofficial made their first contribution in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/161

## Additional info

Beta instructions and discussion at #138.

NOTE: 1.4.0-beta.3 was pulled due to a critical bug. Comparing changes against base version 1.4.0-beta.2.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/compare/1.4.0-beta.2...1.4.0-beta.4
releases.name: 1.4.0-beta.4

releases.name: 1.4.0-beta

releases.author: dbarnett
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* security: npm audit fix (braces, cross-spawn, etc) by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/61
* feat: improve GitHub token flow by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/60
* docs: Add CONTRIBUTING/architecture docs and minor README cleanups by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/71
* tests: Implement jest unit test, lints, and GH check actions by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/73
* chore: Fix lint by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/78
* Tests for Fit component by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/79
* chore: Modernize ESLint setup, update dev deps, fix pr-checks workflow by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/83
* build: Fix pr-checks failure cases for lint command by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/85
* feat(#69): more meaningful error messages for different sync error types by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/80
* feat(#59): Also distinguish errors for repo vs branch by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/86
* chore: Update GH stale workflow to actions/stale@v10 by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/87
* feat: Better retries and rate limit handling for GitHub API by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/89
* feat(#90): Support syncing to empty remote repo by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/91
* refactor: IVault interface for LocalVault and RemoteGitHubVault by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/96
* fix: repair error messaging regressions after refactor by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/98
* refactor: Clean up unused code after refactor by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/100
* fix: a bug mishandling unsynced _fit/ paths by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/101
* feat: Add detailed debug logging to file with opt-out setting by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/103
* docs: Enhance architecture/sync-logic diagrams and visuals by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/107
* fix: Minor race condition on ensureFolderExists in LocalVault by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/108
* fix: Explicitly protect .obsidian and _fit/ paths (treating as clash) by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/110
* feat(#102): Update ribbon command to "Sync to GitHub" by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/114
* refactor: avoid encoding bugs with explicit encoding types by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/115
* fix: better error for file/folder conflict by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/118
* fix: safer local (hidden) file checks before attempting modify/delete + FitSync refactor by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/119
* fix: Data loss prevention when removing tracking for a path by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/120
* refactor: finish simplifying LocalVault & RemoteGitHubVault by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/121


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/compare/1.2.0...1.3.0

releases.author: dbarnett
releases.description:
## Fixes
* Many cases of sync failures for special or hidden filenames

## Improvements
* Much clearer error messages for different sync errors
* Advanced debug logging to help troubleshoot and capture repro details for better bug reports (enabled by default with an opt-out setting)

## What's Changed
* security: npm audit fix (braces, cross-spawn, etc) by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/61
* feat: improve GitHub token flow by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/60
* docs: Add CONTRIBUTING/architecture docs and minor README cleanups by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/71
* tests: Implement jest unit test, lints, and GH check actions by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/73
* chore: Fix lint by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/78
* Tests for Fit component by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/79
* chore: Modernize ESLint setup, update dev deps, fix pr-checks workflow by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/83
* build: Fix pr-checks failure cases for lint command by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/85
* feat(#69): more meaningful error messages for different sync error types by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/80
* feat(#59): Also distinguish errors for repo vs branch by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/86
* chore: Update GH stale workflow to actions/stale@v10 by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/87
* feat: Better retries and rate limit handling for GitHub API by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/89
* feat(#90): Support syncing to empty remote repo by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/91
* refactor: IVault interface for LocalVault and RemoteGitHubVault by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/96
* fix: repair error messaging regressions after refactor by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/98
* refactor: Clean up unused code after refactor by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/100
* fix: a bug mishandling unsynced _fit/ paths by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/101
* feat: Add detailed debug logging to file with opt-out setting by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/103
* docs: Enhance architecture/sync-logic diagrams and visuals by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/107
* fix: Minor race condition on ensureFolderExists in LocalVault by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/108
* fix: Explicitly protect .obsidian and _fit/ paths (treating as clash) by @dbarnett in https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/pull/110

releases.description:
# What's new
- Added auto-sync🎉 capability, (different options available in settings)
- Improved notification system for file changes and conflicts display
- Added setting options to choose verbosity of notifications
- Fixed cases where remote changes are not pulled

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/compare/1.1.0...1.1.1

releases.author: joshuakto
releases.description:
# What's new
- Added auto-sync capability, (different options available in settings)
- Improved notification system for file changes and conflicts display
- Added setting options to choose verbosity of notifications

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/compare/1.0.9...1.1.0

releases.author: joshuakto
releases.description:
### What's Changed

- Enable integration with existing repo/vault
- Improved notices for file changes
- Added file conflict resolution mechanism
- Tested one-click sync and removed push and pull mode
- Removed redundant refresh link button in setting
- Fixed issue where files from the remote are not pulled when there's conflict
- Fixed issue on iOS when attempting to read a binary file as a UTF-8 file during local sha computation
- Improved remote change notification

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/joshuakto/fit/compare/1.0.8...1.0.9
